channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US is ‘pretty far behind where they started’ the war on Iran
item.description: Daniel Benaim says the US missed the early off-ramps to declare victory over Iran.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran spurns talks under threats; Trump says blockade stays
item.description: Iran says will not accept negotiations 'under the shadow of threats', as Trump promises to continue blockade in Hormuz.

item.title: How is the war on Iran affecting the Russia-Ukraine conflict?
item.description: The global energy crisis has implications for both sides.

item.title: What to know about the next round of US-Iran talks in Pakistan
item.description: The US and Iran are supposed to have another round of direct talks in Pakistan on Tuesday, but will the Iranians skip?

item.title: Louisiana mass shooting: What we know about suspect, eight children killed
item.description: The Shreveport attack is the deadliest mass shooting reported in the US in over two years.

item.title: Trump says US will not lift Hormuz blockade until deal made with Iran
item.description: The US president's comments come amid uncertainty over whether Iran will attend peace talks in Pakistan this week.

item.title: Canadian killed in shooting at Mexico's ancient Teotihuacán pyramids
item.description: Several people were also injured in the incident on Monday at the popular tourist site, say Mexican officials, weeks before the country hosts the Fifa World Cup.

item.title: Outrage over Israeli soldier's vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
item.description: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.

item.title: What we know about the Iranian ship seized by the US
item.description: The US has intercepted an Iranian ship entering the Gulf as part of its naval blockade, US President Donald Trump has said.

item.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
item.description: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
